key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often Codex Stats refreshes local Codex usage data.

key.name: log-root
key.description: Directory containing local Codex JSONL session logs.

key.name: show-day
key.summary: Show daily token burn in the panel

key.name: show-primary
key.summary: Show short-window remaining usage in the panel

key.name: show-secondary
key.summary: Show weekly remaining usage in the panel

key.name: panel-show-usage
key.summary: Show usage next to the panel icon
key.description: When enabled, the top bar shows compact 5h and weekly remaining percentages next to the icon.

key.name: cache-enabled
key.description: Store parsed token_count metadata in the user cache directory for faster refreshes.
